testcase.name: getCustomerAddressInfo

failure.message: expected [{"AddressInformation":[{"CustomerId":"AUTO1001","Address":[{"AddressId":"126","AddressCode":"PRIMARY","ContactPerson":"Mr. AUTO1001 AUTO1001","AddressLabel":{"Line1":"123213 AutoStreet RNCH","Line2":"APT","City":"Cartersville","State":"GA","ZipCode":"123456789","Country":"USA","IsDirty":false},"BillToAddress":"1","Override":{"Override":"0","AddressCode":"","FromDate":"1900-01-01","ToDate":"1900-01-01","Recurring":"0"},"PhoneNumber":[{"Number":"","TypeId":"1","Description":"Phone 1","IsDirty":false},{"Number":"","TypeId":"2","Description":"Phone 2","IsDirty":false},{"Number":"","TypeId":"3","Description":"Phone 3","IsDirty":false}],"FaxNumber":{"Number":"","IsDirty":false},"SmartyStreetsMailingAddressCandidate":{"AddressId":"126","DeliveryLine1":"","DeliveryLine2":"","LastLine":"","StreetNumber":"123213","StreetNumberLng":123213,"StrNumberSuffix":"","StreetName":"AutoStreet","StreetType":"RNCH","StreetDirectionP":"","StreetDirection":"","AptNumber":"","AptDescription":"APT","UnitDesignation":"","AptNumberPlus":"","CityName":"Cartersville","State":"GA","ZipCode":"123456789","Country":"USA","Success":true,"MailingAddressMessages":{"Messages":[{"Enabled":0,"Info":"","AddressCode":"PRIMARY"}]}}}],"Acknowledge":0,"AddressConfirm":0,"Success":true,"Messages":[{"AddressCode":"","Enabled":0,"Info":""}]}]}] but found [{"AddressInformation":[{"CustomerId":"AUTO1001","Address":[{"AddressId":"126","AddressCode":"PRIMARY","ContactPerson":"Mr. AUTO1001 AUTO1001","AddressLabel":{"Line1":"123213 AutoStreet RNCH","Line2":"APT","City":"Cartersville","State":"GA","ZipCode":"123456789","Country":"USA","IsDirty":false},"BillToAddress":"1","Override":{"Override":"0","AddressCode":"","FromDate":"1900-01-01","ToDate":"1900-01-01","Recurring":"0"},"PhoneNumber":[{"Number":"","TypeId":"1","Description":"Phone 1","IsDirty":false},{"Number":"","TypeId":"2","Description":"Phone 2","IsDirty":false},{"Number":"","TypeId":"3","Description":"Phone 3","IsDirty":false}],"FaxNumber":{"Number":"","IsDirty":false},"SmartyStreetsMailingAddressCandidate":{"AddressId":"126","DeliveryLine1":"","DeliveryLine2":"","LastLine":"","StreetNumber":"123213","StreetNumberLng":123213,"StrNumberSuffix":"","StreetName":"AutoStreet","StreetType":"RNCH","StreetDirectionP":"","StreetDirection":"","AptNumber":"","AptDescription":"APT","UnitDesignation":"","AptNumberPlus":"","CityName":"Cartersville","State":"GA","ZipCode":"12345","Plus4Code":"6789","Country":"USA","Success":true,"MailingAddressMessages":{"Messages":[{"Enabled":0,"Info":"","AddressCode":"PRIMARY"}]}}}],"Acknowledge":0,"AddressConfirm":0,"Success":true,"Messages":[{"AddressCode":"","Enabled":0,"Info":""}]}]}]
